title: ecbolium ilhense
intro: Ecbolium ilhense is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the Ilhéu plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The Ilhéu plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Ecbolium ilhense is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
